name: ai-gateway
description: Ejecutor LLM (POC, deepseek-only). Entry point: llm.complete.request → llama deepseek con credencial event-driven → llm.complete.response. POC del rewrite aplicando los 8 contratos arquitectonicos (events, lifecycle, observability, errors, persistence, http, naming, glossary).
author: Enki

publishes.description: Response of an llm.complete.request. Shape canonical { request_id, status, data | error }.
Request to credential-manager to resolve an api key for a provider.

subscribes.description: Entry point. Performs a chat completion against deepseek.
Resolves the pending promise for a credential request_id.
Invalidates cache entry of the affected provider.
Invalidates cache entry of the affected provider.
Invalidates cache entry of the deleted provider.

http_clients.name: deepseek
http_clients.descripcion: DeepSeek Chat Completions API. Bearer token resuelto via credential-manager.

lost_on_restart: credentialCache (cache TTL de api keys resueltas)
